OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_ID.description: The Live Stream ID of the stream created in the OpenCTI interface.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_LISTEN_DELETE.description: Whether to listen for delete events from the live stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_NO_DEPENDENCIES.description: Whether to ignore dependencies in the live stream.

CONNECTOR_LIVE_STREAM_START_TIMESTAMP.description: Start timestamp used on connector first start.

CONNECTOR_CONSUMER_COUNT.description: Number of consumer/worker threads used to push data to Splunk.

CONNECTOR_CONFIDENCE_LEVEL.description: Default confidence level for the connector (0-100).

SPLUNK_TOKEN.description: Splunk API token or Base64(user:password) for Basic auth.

SPLUNK_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify SSL certificates when connecting to Splunk.

SPLUNK_APP.description: Splunk app name for the KV Store.

SPLUNK_KV_STORE_NAME.description: Name of the KV Store collection in Splunk.

SPLUNK_IGNORE_TYPES.description: Comma-separated list of STIX entity types to ignore.

METRICS_ADDR.description: Bind IP address for the Prometheus metrics endpoint.

METRICS_PORT.description: Port for the Prometheus metrics endpoint.
